brand.name: Ten2Ten
brand.tagline: Find people moving when you are.

home.heroTitle: Pass your apartment to the next person.
home.heroSubtitle: A verified community where renters hand apartments directly to one another. No broker fees. No subscriptions. Just $100 to connect with three places.
home.ctaSeeker: Tell us what you're looking for
home.trustGratitude: Thank the person leaving — directly, off-platform

intake.title: What are you looking for?
intake.subtitle: We're matching the first members by hand. Tell us what you need and we'll text you the moment something fits.
intake.neighborhoodsHint: e.g. Williamsburg, Astoria, Lower East Side
intake.freeTextPlaceholder: Tell us about the place you're hoping to find.
intake.phoneHint: We'll text you matches. Standard rates apply.
intake.successBody: We'll text you the moment a place matches what you're looking for. No spam — only real matches.
intake.errorRequired: Add a neighborhood and your mobile number so we can reach you.
intake.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

footer.rights: Ten2Ten is not a broker and does not collect or facilitate any payment between members beyond the platform connection fee.

profile.title: Edit profile
profile.errorPhone: Enter a valid phone number starting with + (e.g. +19175550142).
profile.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verify.title: Verify your identity to list
verify.subtitle: A one-time government ID check before you can publish a listing. Takes about 2 minutes.
verify.pendingBody: We're reviewing your information. This usually takes a few seconds.
verify.successBody: Your identity has been confirmed. You now have a verified badge.
verify.failedBody: We weren't able to verify your identity.
verify.failedReasonAge: You must be 18 or older to use Ten2Ten.
verify.failedReasonMismatch: The information provided didn't match our records.
verify.failedReasonDefault: Please try again or contact support.
verify.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Tell us about yourself
onboarding.subtitle: This info helps listers and seekers know who they're talking to.
onboarding.displayNameHint: Other members see this before a chat opens.
onboarding.phoneHint: E.164 format, e.g. +19175550142. Used for SMS notifications.
onboarding.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
onboarding.errorPhone: Enter a valid phone number starting with + (e.g. +19175550142).
onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.confirmBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.errorEmailExists: An account with that email already exists — sign in instead.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSent: Check your email for a reset link.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.warning: This is permanent. Your profile, listings, and preferences will be removed and you will not be able to sign in again.
delete.guardActiveChat: You have an active chat — close it before deleting your account.
delete.guardActiveListing: You have an active or negotiating listing — close it before deleting your account.
delete.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

listing.title: Create your listing
listing.fullAddressHint: Shown only inside an open chat — never on browse or the listing page.
listing.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell seekers about the apartment, the building, the block.
listing.minCreditScoreHint: Optional — leave blank if you don't require one.
listing.gratitudeHint: Off-platform thank-you to the person leaving. We don't facilitate or verify this.
listing.confirmAvailability: I have contacted this person and confirmed the apartment is available.
listing.confirmAccuracy: I understand inaccurate details may get my listing removed.
listing.editLockedNegotiating: This listing is in an active conversation and can't be edited right now.
listing.blockActiveListing: You already have an active listing. Close it before publishing another.
listing.blockYearlyLimit: You've reached the limit of 3 published listings this year.
listing.errorRequired: Complete all required fields, the 3 required photos, and both confirmations before publishing.
listing.errorPastDate: Available-from date can't be in the past.
listing.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
listing.errorLoadTimeout: This is taking longer than expected. Check your connection and try again.
listing.successBody: It's now visible to seekers on Browse.

browse.title: Browse
browse.errorGeneric: Something went wrong loading listings. Please try again.
browse.noResultsBody: Try widening your search or filters, or check back soon.

listingDetail.connectStub: Connect is coming in a future update.
listingDetail.ownerNote: This is your listing — you can't connect to it.
listingDetail.activeChatNote: You already have an active conversation. Close it before connecting to another listing.
listingDetail.connectErrorGeneric: Couldn't open the conversation. Please try again.
listingDetail.blockTitle: You don't meet this listing's credit minimum
listingDetail.blockBody: This listing requires a minimum credit score of {min}. Your verified score is {score}. Nothing has been charged and no credit was used.
listingDetail.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

myListings.title: My listings
myListings.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
myListings.chatStub: Chat is coming in a future update.
myListings.noActiveListing: You don't have an active listing yet.
